Plaintiff Ryan Engineering, Inc.S Request For Prove-Up Hearing For Entry Of Default Judgment
Off Calendar Jul-12-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: A. Mok, CSR: Mitch Lyon, CSR#6840.

Ansel Kinney, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, Ryan Engineering.
No appearance by defaulted defendants Ronnie Baker and Your Soil Solution,
Default of Defendants has been duly entered.
Court ordered Defendants Does 1-100 dismissed without prejudice.
Witness: Ceire Fogelman and Mr. Ryan sworn and examined on behalf of Plaintiff.

Plaintiff's Exhibit:
1-Cashier's Check
Court returned exhibit to Plaintiff.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendants as follows:
Damages: $31,500.00
Pre-Judgment Interest: $1575.00
Attorney's Fees: $0
Costs: $710.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $33,785.00

Judgment signed in open court.

Plaintiff Ryan Engineering, Inc.S Request For Prove-Up Hearing For Entry Of Default Judgment
Off Calendar Jun-08-2016 Continued To Jul-12-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514
